programmes.show_description: Téann Eva i ndiaidh Mads chun eolas a fháil faoina deontóir. (Eva runs after Mads to get information about her donor.)
Súil siar ar na hagallaimh, taibhléirithe agus gearrscannáin ón tsraith Imeall. (A look back at interviews, performances and short film pieces from the series Imeall.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (A look back at songs we grew up with.)
Buaicphointí ó chomórtas Steip ag Oireachtas na Samhna 2025 i mBéal Feirste. (Highlights from the Steip competition at Oireachtas na Samhna 2025 in Belfast.)
Rogha amhrán ó shraith 17 de Ghlór Tíre. (Featuring The Sheerin Family, Cliona Hagan, Michael English, Mike Denver, Louise Morrissey & Robert Mizzell.)
Rachaidh Mairéad agus Conall ag WWOOFáil ar Fheirm Broughgammon i gCo. Aontroma. (Conall and Mairéad go Wwoofing at Broughgammon, a goat farm in Antrim.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Cé atá ag salú na háite? Níl Glibín sásta ar chor ar bith. (Glibín wants to find out who's throwing rubbish everywhere.)
Tugann Babaí Trucail faoi scrúdú tiomána. (Baby Truck takes her first driving test.)
Bíonn Cory an-bhuíoch nuair a chniotálann Mamó geansaí deas dó. (Cory is very grateful when Grandma knits him a jumper.)
Tá na hasail ag iarraidh líomanáid a dhéanamh ó tharla an lá an-te. (It's very hot today, and the donkeys would like to make lemonade.)
Tá Zee ag iarraidh teagmháil a dhéanamh le Sif sa spás. (Zee needs to communicate with Sif in outer space.)
Briseann an clog mór agus ní bhíonn a fhios ag aon duine cén t-am é! (Panic erupts in Pretty Big City when the big clock breaks and no one is able to tell what time it is.)
Déanann gaireas nua Romeo diabhailíní d'Owlette agus de Catboy. (Romeo's newest device turns Owlette and Catboy into villains.)
Geallann Finny agus Mara go mbeidh siad múinte tigh Oscair. (Finny and Sammy promise to mind their manners during their playdate at Oscar's house.)
Is breá le Igam Ogam a bheith ag brú cnaipí. (Igam Ogam loves pressing buttons.)
Tá Pinocchio ag iarraidh an dá thrá a fhreastal. (Pinocchio wants to be in two places at once.)
Caithfidh Pinocchio agus Sionnán liathróid a fháil ar ais. (Pinocchio and Sionnán have to retrieve a ball from an ogre's house.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Cé go bhfuil an dearg-ghráin ag Lola ar thrátaí tá sí an-tógtha le planda Charlie. (Lola is impressed by the tomato plant that Charlie is growing, even though she hates tomatoes.)
Tá rún ag Charlie agus Lola sorcas a chur ar siúl dá seantuismitheoirí. (Charlie and Lola are planning to entertain their grandparents with a circus.)
Tugann Lotta a cóta ar iasacht do Lola ach nach gcailleann Lola é! (Lola borrows Lotta's coat but ends up losing it!)
Tá Charlie agus Lola ag súil go mór le seó puipéad. (Charlie and Lola are looking forward to a Chinese puppet show.)
Tá Charlie, Marv, Lotta agus Lola ag súil go mór leis an lá spóirt. (Charlie, Marv, Lotta and Lola are all looking forward to the sports day.)
Socraíonn Zak agus Jason scannán a thaifeadadh fad atá Mamó Áine ina codladh. (Zak and Jason decide to record their own movie while Mamó Áine is asleep.)
Tá aonach eagraithe chun airgead a bhailiú don turas scoile ach meas tú cad a bheidh le díol ann? (A school fair has been organised to raise money for this year's school trip.)
Caithfidh Mó fótaisheisiún a dhéanamh lena athair amuigh faoin tuath. (Mo's father enlists him for a celebrity photo shoot in the countryside.)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)
Cuirfear deireadh leis an tsraith in oirdheisceart an Chláir ag Seó Bhaile an Droichid. (The series wraps in Southeast Clare at the Bridgetown Show.)
Tá Dorothy craiceáilte i ndiaidh duine d'fhoireann "Beatlemania". (Dorothy goes bananas over a "Beatlemania" cast member.)
Níl ag éirí rómhaith le Rory sa scoil nua. (Rory has trouble getting good grades at her new school.)
Tá muintir Carroll i gCabhán ag fáil faoi réir le laonna na bliana seo caite a dhíol. (The Carroll's in Cavan are preparing last year's calves for the mart.)
Craoladh beo ón Láthair Náisiúnta Chispheile ar Bhabhtaí Ceannais Ard-Sraith Domino's i gCispheil na mBan. (Live coverage of the Domino's Women's Super League Basketball Finals.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Is iad Na Tonnta agus Eve Belle a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (This week, Na Tonnta and Eve Belle swap songs for a musical challenge.)
Bíonn sé ina raic idir Natasha agus Cam nuair a chuireann sí dúnmharú ina leith. (Natasha wants everyone on board with her vendetta against Cora.)

Leanfaidh Sharon agus Caoilinn lena dturas agus casfaidh siad le Mundy i bPort Omna. (Sharon & Caoilinn continue their journey of the Heartlands and meet Mundy in Portumna.)

The Hothouse Flowers a bheidh i mbun cainte le Dáithí sa chlár seo. (Dáithí Ó Sé meets The Hothouse Flowers.)

Leaneann an Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt lorg Annraoi Ó Liatháin fad na Siúire. (Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt continues in the footsteps of Annroai O' Liatháin along the River Suir.)

Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Cuirtear an croí trasna i gClúmh nuair a fheiceann sé scáth ar an bpuball. (A shadow on the tent spooks Fluff and threatens to spoil Tweedy's camping plan!)
Má tá tú sona sásta, buail do bhosa! (If you're happy and you know it, clap your hands!)
Tá JJ agus Mochi an Moncaí ag dul ag snámh! (JJ and Mochi the Monkey are going for a swim!)
Bíonn spraoi ag na Dathanna ag meascadh lena chéile. (The Colours have fun mixing together.)
Tá an t-Uasal Traenach bailithe i bhfostú ar na ráillí! (Mr. Coaltrain find himself in a pickle when he gets stuck on the tracks!)
Deir Mam go gcaithfidh Caitríona agus Roy dul a chodladh luath ach níl baol orthu! (Mam said that Caitríona and Roy have to go to bed early, but they have other ideas.)
Ag foghlaim faoi mhapaí a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about maps today.)
Ag foghlaim chun é féin a ghléasadh a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about getting dressed.)
Níl a fhios ag Zac cén chaoi is fearr dó cairde a dhéanamh. (Zac wants to make friends with Mo but doesn't know how.)
Tugann Norbet leis babhla sméara na hOlobobanna trí thimpiste. (Norbet accidentally takes the key ingredient for the Olobob's cake.)
Tagann na diabhailíní ar fad le chéile chun na PJ Masks a chloí. (All the villains (not the wolfies) join forces to defeat the PJ Masks forever.)
Tá Wussywat ag iarraidh na potaí a thógáil as an mbealach sa ghairdín ach tá siad trom. (Wussywat wants to move a pile of pots from the garden but they are heavy.)
Tá imní ar Clifford faoin méid a dúirt bean feasa leis ag aonach siamsaíochta. (Clifford becomes worried after getting his fortune told at the Birdwell Fun Fair.)
Níl Pip ag iarraidh cnámh a roinnt le Woozle. (Pip doesn't want to share a bone with Woozle.)
Téann Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex óga ar eachtra faoi uisce. (Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes go on an underwater adventure inside a rubbery bubble.)
Ceannaíonn Dot agus Mam gaireas do Dheaide do Lá na nAithreacha. (Dot and Mom surprise Dad with a fancy hands-free assistant device for Father's Day.)
Caithfidh an tUasal Jackson rothar Henry a dheisiú, ach is cosúil go bhfuil a chuid uirlisí ar iarraidh. (Mr Jackson needs to fix Henry's bike.)

Tá jabanna beaga le déanamh ag Charlie agus Lola. (Mammy has told Charlie and Lola that they must do many chores.)
Tá an Banphrionsa Petswiper ag iarraidh peata cóála. (Princess Petswiper wants a koala for a pet.)
Tagann Sadie ar lámhainn dhraíochta. (Sadie obtains a magic glove which can change the ordinary door you're opening into a portal into another room.)
Féachann Angelo le cleas draíochta nua a dhéanamh. (Angelo decides to create a new magic trick.)
Diúltaíonn Dónall dul ar scoil agus a bheith dána! (Dónall Dána refuses to go to school or be bold!)

Amhrán spraíúil faoi uachtar reoite brocailí a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about broccoli ice cream.)
Déanann Naoi Déag roinnt cruthanna craiceáilte. (Nineteen makes some crazy shapes.)
Baineann Gorm triail as bia nua le cabhair ón chairde. (Blue tries some new foods today, with some help from his friends.)
Tá ár gcairde ag iarraidh breathnú ar scannán, ach an mbeidh Gabh agus Stop in ann é a chur ar siúl? (It's film night, but how can Go and Stop get the movie to start?)
Tá Pompon agus Rita ag iarraidh baile nua a fháil do na seangáin sa bhforaois. (Join Pompon and Rita on an adventure to find the ants a new home in the forest.)
Is é Seán Mistéil a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Seán Mistéil.)
Faigheann Pip agus Posy bréagáin a bhí ag Frankie. (Pip and Posy get hand-me-down toys from Frankie.)
Tá Clóra ag streachailt go mór páirt a ghlacadh i ngníomhaíocht an lae inniu. (Clóra's having real difficulty taking part in today's activity.)
Imríonn Helen cispheil leis na bréagáin. (Helen takes the toys out to play basketball.)

programmes.show_name: True agus Ríocht an Bhogha Ceatha
programmes.show_description: Tá an lá agus an oíche tagtha in éineacht  i gCathair an Bhogha Ceatha. (When Day and Night come together it creates a huge problem in Rainbow City.)
Samhlaíonn Ruarc a shaol ina ghlantóir nuair a bheidh sé mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Ruarc imagines his life as a cleaner when he grows up, with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Ag péinteáil a bheidh Zou inniu. (On today's programme Zou gets some painting done.)
Is lá an-speisialta é in Abra Dabra agus caithfidh an áit a bheith glan agus néata. (Today is a very special day in Abra Dabra and everything needs to be clean and tidy.)
Taispeánann Neasa dúinn le caora a dhéanamh as cupáin pháipéir. (Neasa shows us how to make sheep out of paper cups.)
Beidh gadhar ag tochailt agus cat atá tinn tuirseach de dhramhphost i measc na n-ainmhithe inniu. (Today we'll dig deep and we'll even take a moment to sort through our junk mail.)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)
Bíonn sé ina achrann idir Lois agus bean bhéadánach agus a fear céile ag picnic de chuid chomhlacht Hal. (Lois clashes with a blabby wife and her spouse Hal's company picnic.)
Tá Nick ar ais agus é ag iarraidh go gcuirfear duine dá pháistí faoina chúram. (Nick returns and demands that Carla gives him custody of one of their kids.)
Ceol traidisiúnta den scoth ón deisceart á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín de Paor agus Breandán Ó Beaglaoich. (Music from Cork and Kerry presented by Eibhlín de Paor.)
Nuair a bhuaileann carr gan tiománaí fear gnó ní bhíonn Jessica ná na póilíní in ann bun ná barr a dhéanamh den scéal. (Jessica & the police are baffled by a 'driverless' car.)
Sraith ceoil thraidisiúnta nua ó fhéile Scoil Cheoil an Earraigh 2024 i gCorca Dhuibhne. (Pádraig Ó Sé brings us the best of music from Scoil Cheoil an Earraigh 2024.)
Beidh radharcanna den scoth le feiceáil ag Paul i measc lochanna agus sléibhte Wester Ross. (Paul takes in some breathtaking scenery among the lochs and mountains of Wester Ross.)
Beidh John Hogan ag gabháil fhoinn ar an gclár. (John Hogan performs on the show.)
Déanann Lorelai dearmad a insint do Rory go bhfuil sí chun dul amach in éineacht lena múinteoir, Max. Lorelai forgets to tell Rory that she has a date with Rory's teacher Max.
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Buailfidh muid le lánúin i gCluain Tarbh a bhfuil an greann lárnach ina saol. (This week, we celebrate the 2000s with two Clontarf teachers and a Belfast tale of teenage love.)

Tá Nick ar ais agus é ag iarraidh go gcuirfear duine dá pháistí faoina chúram. (Nick returns and demands that Carla gives him custody of one of their kids.)

Ní bheidh na taistealaithe ag dul i bhfad ó bhaile agus iad ag tabhairt aghaidh ar Chathair Dhoire. (This week, the trio are not venturing far from home as they head off to Derry.)
